summary: ToolRegistry has no runtime register/unregister API — tools are frozen after layer init. Phase 5 must add dynamic external tool storage (Ref<Map<string, Tool.Info[]>>) to InstanceState
detail: ToolRegistry.Interface exposes ids(), all(), named(), tools(model), cacheStats(), suggestNext() — none accept registration. State is built once at layer construction from static builtin array + plugin-scanned custom array. MCP tools are completely separate (in MCP.Service's own InstanceState). For Phase 5 to integrate MCP tools into ToolRegistry, we must either: (A) add external Ref storage and merge into query methods, (B) keep MCP tools separate but lifecycle-managed, or (C) create a bridge service. Option A recommended: add toolRegistry.external: Ref<Map<string, Tool.Info[]>> to existing InstanceState, merge in all query methods.
